dev_focus: BOLT: Fix DevChat widget auth — it's broken in production because unauthenticated users see the full chat form but all API calls return 401 silently. Root cause analyzed by Lead C2551. FIX in src/components/dev-chat/dev-chat-widget.tsx: (1) Import useSession from 'next-auth/react'. (2) At top of DevChatWidget(), add: const { status: authStatus } = useSession(). (3) Before the return JSX, if authStatus === 'unauthenticated': render ONLY the floating bubble button (keep same button styling), but when bubble is clicked show the panel with header + a centered 'Přihlas se pro komunikaci s týmem' message + a login button linking to /api/auth/signin. No textarea, no send button. (4) If authStatus === 'loading': render the bubble only, panel shows spinner. (5) If authStatus === 'authenticated': current code unchanged (already works correctly for auth users). Also in fetchMessages: when res.status === 401, don't silently ignore — set a state flag `setAuthRequired(true)` so the UI can react. Add `authRequired` state (boolean, default false). In GET call, also add that check. Run npm run build when done. Trace unpaused and will verify after commit.
notes: C2551 Lead — Delivery deadline 100% DONE (verified in code: page.tsx line 251 + email.ts line 40,194). Marked TODO done. Bolt was looping with same commit message — stale dev_focus. New focus: DevChat widget auth fix. Trace unpaused to verify after Bolt commits.

schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name → run_every integer (overrides DB value)

session_manager.kill_zombie_tasks: bool — kill tasks stuck as 'running' for >30min
session_manager.requeue_failed: list of task IDs to requeue (max 5)
session_manager.reset_no_change_counter: bool — prevent auto-pause from consecutive no-change cycles
